meta.title: Predicting Events with Large Language Models
meta.description:
➡️ Colab Notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1FDxLic7DxO9boh-UXi84Cej9P9lQyTLC?usp=sharing
➡️ Newsletter: https://blog.Trelis.com
➡️ Resources/Support/Discord: https://Trelis.com/About
➡️ Thumbnail made with this tutorial: https://youtu.be/ThKYjTdkyP8

OTHER RESOURCES:
- Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/12z3XWj6I46ZaBjWV_kTQdB_-AG3U5WI74D4DPhkGlbY/edit?usp=sharing
- Metaculus Q4 Tournament: https://www.metaculus.com/tournament/aibq4/
- Berkeley / Halawi Paper: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2402.18563

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Using LLMs for Forecasting
0:29 Video Overview
1:07 Metaculus Bot Competition.
3:35 Demo: How to forecast with an LLM.
7:50 Lessons from the Berkeley Forecasting Paper.
12:46 Advanced techniques.
15:22 Caveats for Practical Decision-making: Probs vs Payoffs.
16:36 Notebook Demo: Metaculus Bot Competition.
24:27 Outro / Resources
